snippet.title: MANTIDE predatore finale - SCIENZA BRUTTA
snippet.description:
Grazie a NordVPN per aver supportato la divulgazione brutta! Potete avere il 70% di sconto sul piano biennale (2.85 ‚Ç¨/mese) pi√π 1 mese extra AGGRATIS usando questo link https://nordvpn.com/barbascurax o il codice "barbascurax".
Checkout NordVPN's videos on https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yCWNRzoQGis

--------------------------------------------------------------------
Un ringraziamento a:
Associazione culturale Settimo Continente (Roma, info@settimocontinente.com https://www.instagram.com/settimocontinente/?hl=it ) per la location.
 @ZooSparkle e LaGiada Naturalista (instagram @la_giada_naturalista) per la revisione dei testi.
Moreno Stefanuto e  @ThePio3D  per l'aiuto montaggio.
Emanuel Simeoni per il supporto logistico.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Per approfondire i temi trattati:
1) Burke, Nathan W., and Gregory I. Holwell. "Male coercion and female injury in a sexually cannibalistic mantis." Biology Letters 17.1 (2021): 20200811.
2) Brown, William D., and Katherine L. Barry. "Sexual cannibalism increases male material investment in offspring: quantifying terminal reproductive effort in a praying mantis." Proceedings of the Royal Society B: Biological Sciences 283.1833 (2016): 20160656.
3) Animalogic https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aMdrI_zCrjo
4) Yager, David D. "15. Comparative Aspects of Rearing and Breeding Mantids." (1999).
5) Benoit, Amanda D., and Susan Kalisz. "Predator Effects on Plant-Pollinator Interactions, Plant Reproduction, Mating Systems, and Evolution." Annual Review of Ecology, Evolution, and Systematics 51 (2020): 319-340.
6) O'Hanlon, James C. "The Roles of Colour and Shape in Pollinator Deception in the Orchid Mantis Hymenopus coronatus." Ethology 120.7 (2014): 652-661.
7) Burrows, Malcolm, et al. "Mantises exchange angular momentum between three rotating body parts to jump precisely to targets." Current Biology 25.6 (2015): 786-789.
8) Rossoni, Sergio, and Jeremy E. Niven. "Prey speed influences the speed and structure of the raptorial strike of a ‚Äòsit-and-wait‚Äôpredator." Biology letters 16.5 (2020): 20200098.
9) https://www.nytimes.com/2020/05/14/science/praying-mantis-strike.html
10) Nyffeler, Martin, Michael R. Maxwell, and J. V. Remsen Jr. "Bird predation by praying mantises: a global perspective." The Wilson Journal of Ornithology 129.2 (2017): 331-344.
11) Birkhead, T. R., K. E. Lee, and P. Young. "Sexual cannibalism in the praying mantis Hierodula membranacea." Behaviour 106.1-2 (1988): 112-118.
12) Rilling, Susan, Horst Mittelstaedt, and K. D. Roeder. "Prey recognition in the praying mantis." Behaviour (1959): 164-184.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Potete recuperare gli episodi di 'Micromostri con Barbascura X' su Discovery+ https://www.discoveryplus.it/programmi/micromostri-con-barbascura-x oppure controllare quando ci saranno le repliche su DMAX.

Per recuperare i miei servizi per RAI3: https://www.raiplay.it/ricerca.html?q=barbascura

I miei libri: https://barbascurax.pocketfolio.net/libri-e-fumetti/

T-shirt e gadget: https://barbascurax.pocketfolio.net/

Unisciti alla ciurma! Raggiungici sugli altri social: https://barbascurax.pocketfolio.net/social/

00:00 SPONSOR

‚ÄúMANGIO TUTTI I PASTI DEI GENTLEMEN IN 20 MINUTI‚Äù

Ed eccomi qua ragazzi questa settimana pronto per affrontare una Gentlemen challenge!

Dopo aver resistito alle avance culinarie dei miei compagni Gentlemen durante un‚Äôappetitosa cena dove questi tre ‚Äúpersonaggi‚Äù hanno deciso di ordinare pizza, hamburger e carne con rinforzo di patatine, escludendomi da questo delizioso banchetto per via di una strana prova di resistenza inversa nella quale dovevo resistere appunto a queste leccornie evitando di cedere in tentazioni mentre loro nutrivano il loro piccolo appetito, ho deciso di prendermi una rivincita!

In questa challenge improvvisata ho deciso di ordinare tutti i pasti consumati dai Gentlemen in questa deliziosa cena e di smantellarli tutti in meno di venti minuti (ovvero il tempo impiegato da quest‚Äôultimi per terminare questo convito)

In questa rivincita considerando che ho indossato la mia divisa da Gentlemen, mi sar√≤ limitato a gustare queste prelibatezze lasciando cos√¨ una piccola possibilit√Ý di vittoria agli altri, o il lato Hungry avr√Ý preso il sopravvento facendomi spazzolare i loro pasti prima dello scadere del tempo pattuito!?

Ovviamente lo scoprirete solo gustandovi il primo episodio di questa nuova collaborazione con i GENTLEMEN!

Se ti √® piaciuto il video come sempre iscriviti al mio canale e condividi!!!

Noi ci vediamo al prossimo video... e nel frattempo...
STAY FIT!! &
STAY HUNGRY!!

snippet.title: Crew-2 Mission | Launch
snippet.description:
SpaceX and NASA are targeting Friday, April 23 for Falcon 9‚Äôs launch of Dragon‚Äôs second six-month operational crew mission (Crew-2) to the International Space Station (ISS) from historic Launch Complex 39A (LC-39A) at NASA‚Äôs Kennedy Space Center in Florida. The instantaneous launch window opens at 5:49 a.m. EDT, 9:49 UTC, with a backup opportunity available on Monday, April 26 at 4:38 a.m. EDT, 8:38 UTC. 

Following stage separation, Falcon 9‚Äôs first stage will land on the ‚ÄúOf Course I Still Love You‚Äù droneship, which will be stationed in the Atlantic Ocean. On Saturday, April 24, at approximately 5:10 a.m. EDT, 9:10 UTC, Dragon is expected to autonomously dock with the International Space Station.

This is the first human spaceflight mission to fly astronauts on a flight-proven Falcon 9 and Dragon. The Falcon 9 first stage supporting this mission previously launched the Crew-1 mission in November 2020 and the Dragon spacecraft previously flew Robert Behnken and Douglas Hurley to and from the International Space Station during SpaceX‚Äôs Demo-2 mission in 2020. 

The webcast will go live approximately 4 hours ahead of launch.

snippet.title: SPECIALE TITANIC - "Come Ca**o Hanno Fatto?"‚éÆ Slim Dogs
snippet.description:

Se vuoi seguire le nostre live su Twitch clicca qui: https://www.twitch.tv/slimdogsproduction

Uno speciale grazie a @Angelo Maggi (voce italiana di Robert Downey JR // Tony Stark) per aver prestato la sua voce per la nostra nuova sigla. Per guardare tutti i suoi sdoppiaggi seguilo su Instagram: https://bit.ly/3gxZ5WD

00:46 Come hanno girato il ritrovamento del Titanic?

10:57 Come hanno ricostruito il Titanic nel suo interno?
12:25 Quanto √® costato realizzare il film Titanic?
14:00 Leonardo DiCaprio, la porta e come hanno girato il naufragio del Titanic? 
21:37 I Dogscar!

snippet.title: Personal: Massimo Pericolo racconta il suo presente, i suoi dubbi e le sue ansie
snippet.description:
Attenzione: l'intervista contiene riferimenti espliciti a depressione, abuso di sostanze e violenza.

Massimo Pericolo ha ammesso pi√π volte che il suo secondo disco 'SOLO TUTTO' √® stato difficile da scrivere: si sono messi in mezzo la fama e il successo conquistati con il primo 'Scialla Semper', ma anche la pandemia globale che ha fermato le vite di tutti‚Äîe se non fai esperienze di cosa scrivi? Abbiamo invitato Alessandro sulla poltrona di Noisey Personal per indagare un po‚Äô pi√π a fondo la sua visione quantomeno particolare del mondo.

Intervista di Giacomo Stefanini.

Segui Noisey Italia su Instagram: https://instagram.com/noiseyit
Segui Noisey Italia su Facebook: http://fb.com/noiseyit

**
Iscriviti al canale YouTube di Noisey Italia per non perderti i prossimi video: http://bit.ly/Iscriviti-a-Noisey

snippet.title: THE CONJURING: PER ORDINE DEL DIAVOLO ‚Äì Trailer Ufficiale Italiano
snippet.description:
Una storia vera, basata sui casi di Ed e Lorraine Warren. 
#TheConjuring: Per Ordine Del Diavolo, dal 3 giugno al cinema.

"The Conjuring: Per Ordine Del Diavolo" narra un'agghiacciante storia di terrore, 
omicidio e male oscuro, che ha sconvolto persino gli investigatori del paranormale Ed e Lorraine Warren. Uno dei casi pi√π sensazionali da loro affrontati, inizia con la lotta per l'anima di un ragazzo, che ha portato i due demonologi a cose mai viste prima, segnando la prima volta nella storia degli Stati Uniti in cui un sospetto omicida avrebbe reclamato la sua possessione demoniaca come difesa.

Vera Farmiga e Patrick Wilson tornano a recitare nei panni di Lorraine e Ed Warren, sotto la direzione di Michael Chaves ("La Llorona ‚Äì le lacrime del male"). Fanno parte del cast del film Ruairi O'Connor ("The Spanish Princess" di Starz), Sarah Catherine Hook ("Monsterland" di Hulu) e Julian Hilliard (le serie "Penny Dreadful: City of Angels" e "Hill House").

"The Conjuring: Per Ordine Del Diavolo" √® prodotto da James Wan e Peter Safran, che hanno gi√Ý collaborato a tutti i film dell'universo di "The Conjuring". Chaves ha diretto il film da una sceneggiatura di David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick ("The Conjuring 2‚Äì Il caso Enfield", "Aquaman"), una storia di James Wan e David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick, basata sui personaggi creati da Chad Hayes e Carey W. Hayes. I produttori esecutivi sono Richard Brener, Dave Neustadter, Victoria Palmeri, Michael Clear, Judson Scott e Michelle Morrissey.

La squadra creativa che ha lavorato dietro le quinte ha riunito i collaboratori dell'universo di ‚ÄúThe Conjuring‚Äù tra cui il direttore della fotografia Michael Burgess, la scenografa Jennifer Spence, la costumista Leah Butler e il compositore Joseph Bishara, insieme al montatore del regista di ‚ÄúLa Llorona ‚Äì le lacrime del male‚Äù, Peter Gvozdas e Christian Wagner (‚ÄúFurious 7‚Äù).

 ‚ÄúThe Conjuring: Per Ordine Del Diavolo‚Äù √® il settimo film dell'universo di "The Conjuring‚Äù, il pi√π grande franchise horror della storia, che ha incassato pi√π di 1,8 miliardi di dollari in tutto il mondo. Ne fanno parte i primi due capitoli di "The Conjuring", nonch√© "Annabelle" e "Annabelle 2: Creation", "The Nun ‚Äì la Vocazione del Male" e "Annabelle 3".

New Line Cinema presenta una produzione Atomic Monster / Peter Safran, "The Conjuring: Per Ordine Del Diavolo", che sar√Ý distribuita da Warner Bros. Pictures, e uscir√Ý al cinema in Italia dal 3 giugno 2021.

snippet.title: AX Armani Exchange Milan - FC Bayern Munich Highlights | Turkish Airlines EuroLeague, PO Game 2
snippet.description:
AX Armani Exchange Milan moved within one victory of its first Turkish Airlines EuroLeague Final Four in 29 years with a hard-fought 80-69 win at home over FC Bayern Munich for a 2-0 lead in their best-of-5 series. 



ABOUT EUROLEAGUE BASKETBALL 
Euroleague Basketball (EB) is a global leader in the sports and entertainment business, devoted to running the top European competitions of professional basketball clubs under a unique and innovative organizational model. Owned and administered by some of the most successful and historic clubs in the world, EB manages and organizes the continent‚Äôs two premier men‚Äôs basketball competitions, the Turkish Airlines EuroLeague and the 7DAYS EuroCup, as well as the sport‚Äôs premier under-18 showcase, the EB Adidas Next Generation Tournament. 
The EB competitions bring the elite of European basketball to all five continents and to the entire sports community through the OTT platform EuroLeague TV. EB also organizes a series of community and educational programs. Its ground-breaking corporate social responsibility program One Team features all EB clubs that have already made a difference in the lives of over 22,000 participants. Its Sports Business MBA trains future professionals in sports management. 
About One Team 
One Team, Euroleague Basketball's corporate social responsibility (CSR) program, supported by Turkish Airlines as the One Team Founding Patron and with the collaboration of Special Olympics as Proud Partner, uses basketball to achieve real social impact in our communities. With an innovative model of interconnectedness across an entire continent, Euroleague Basketball and its clubs have developed a complete CSR program that brings together activities from each team in an integrated, impactful way, working under the theme of "community integration". Each participating club develops a specific One Team project tailored to its own community needs to benefit groups in danger of exclusion due to problems such as substance abuse and gender, physical or intellectual disability. Since its founding in 2012, the One Team program has reached already directly and indirectly more than 22,000 participants through its various team projects.

snippet.title: Highlights stages 1-4 / WRC Croatia Rally 2021
snippet.description:
Kalle Rovanper√§ crashing on SS1, what a disappointing start for the young championship leader...
Follow the event live on WRC.com: https://www.wrc.com/en/wrcplus/live-timing/

More FREE videos, news and results at https://www.wrc.com‚Äã

Watch LIVE rally! All stages of every rally live or on demand with live cameras on stage, onboard and in the air, including expert analysis, behind the scenes stories, split times and real time GPS tracking. Thousands of onboard videos with moving maps, speed, gear, pedal and steering data, rally highlights, and exclusive videos all available on demand anytime, on any device with your subscription to WRC+ All Live.
http://www.wrcplus.com/‚Äã

Find out about the official WRC video game on PC, XBox, Playstation and Nintendo Consoles here.
https://www.wrcthegame.com‚Äã

eSports WRC Championship, is open to anyone, driving on the same roads and stages as the real-life WRC.
https://www.wrc.com/en/more/gaming/es...‚Äã

Rally Fan? Merch, clothing and more at the official shop of the FIA World Rally Championship.
https://shop.wrc.com/‚Äã

Subscribe to this YouTube Channel for exclusive, frequent new rally videos.
https://www.youtube.com/user/wrc?sub_...‚Äã

Behind the scenes and more on Facebook.
https://www.facebook.com/WorldRally‚Äã

Videos, photos, stories and competitions to win on Instagram.
https://www.instagram.com/officialwrc/‚Äã

News, results, photos, videos on Twitter.
https://twitter.com/OfficialWRC‚Äã

The WRC is the FIA World Rally Championship, a tough motorsport using rally cars on real roads around the world. Watch the best rally drivers battle on gravel and asphalt roads with mud, rain, dust, ice and heat! Watch high speed action as the rally drivers power slide and drift round narrow corners, go flat out over a big jump or through a watersplash, handbrake turn round a hairpin, survive a big moment, or have a massive crash! Rally requires maximum attack and careful tactics to become world rally champion.

Each rally has timed sections called special stages, on closed roads. Drivers complete these stages as quickly as possible. A co-driver reads pace notes that explain the hazards ahead. Rally drivers use the same rally car to travel to each stage on public roads, following normal traffic regulations. The crew which completes all the stages in the shortest time is the rally winner. Championship points are won using the same scoring system as Formula 1. The championship is administered by F√©d√©ration Internationale de l'Automobile (FIA), motorsport's world governing body.

Over 30 countries have hosted WRC rallies. Rally Monte Carlo, Rally Argentina, Rally Finland, Rally Portugal, Tour de Corse on Corsica, France, Rally Sardegna on Sardinia, Italy, Safari Rally in Kenya, Acropolis Rally in Greece, Rally New Zealand, Rally Australia, Rally Japan, Rally GB, Rally Catalunya, Rallye Deutschland, Rally Mexico and many more.

Some of the world's greatest drivers have won the FIA World Rally Championship for Drivers, like Colin McRae, Carlos Sainz, Walter R√∂hrl, Stig Blomqvist, Petter Solberg, Ott T√§nak. The list of world rally champions includes many Finnish rally drivers like Juha Kankkunen, Tommi M√§kinen, Ari Vatanen, Marcus Gr√∂nholm, Hannu Mikkola. French drivers have had success with S√©bastien Ogier, and 9 times world champion S√©bastien Loeb. Famous drivers from other motorsports have come to try rally driving like Ken Block from Rallycross, and Robert Kubica and Kimi R√§ikk√∂nen from F1.

Car companies compete for the prestigious FIA World Rally Championship for Manufacturers awarded to the most successful WRC constructor. Winners include Citroen, Hyundai, Volkswagen and Peugeot. Ford have had success with the Ford Escort, Ford Focus and Ford Fiesta when the M-Sport team won in 2017.
The 1980's featured the iconic Group B rally cars like the Lancia 037 and Delta S4, Peugeot 205 T16, MG Metro 6R4, Ford RS200 and Audi Quattro.
Japan dominated the 1990s with the Mitsubishi Lancer, Subaru Impreza, and Toyota Celica and Toyota Corolla. Toyota returned to the WRC in 2017 with the Toyota Yaris WRC, winning in 2018 and 2020. The 2019 championship was won by Hyundai with the Hyundai i20 Coupe WRC. Find out about the latest winners and champions at https://www.wrc.com

snippet.title: Singaporean in London attacked, saved by livestreamer
snippet.description:
Singaporean student Raymond Hing, 21, is seen being assaulted in real-time in London. 

The attack was recorded by YouTuber ‚ÄúSherwin‚Äù, who had been doing a livestream. Sherwin‚Äôs video shows him rushing to the aid of Mr Hing, shouting repeatedly at the attacker to ‚ÄúLeave him alone!‚Äù

The attacker makes a lunge for Mr Hing‚Äôs bicycle, before running away.

snippet.title: AX Armani Exchange Milan - FC Bayern Munich Highlights | Turkish Airlines EuroLeague, PO Game 1
snippet.description:
In scenes of incredible drama AX Armani Exchange Milan launched the second-biggest comeback in playoffs history, defeating FC Bayern Munich 79-78 with a buzzer-beating game-winner from Zach LeDay. 



ABOUT EUROLEAGUE BASKETBALL 
Euroleague Basketball (EB) is a global leader in the sports and entertainment business, devoted to running the top European competitions of professional basketball clubs under a unique and innovative organizational model. Owned and administered by some of the most successful and historic clubs in the world, EB manages and organizes the continent‚Äôs two premier men‚Äôs basketball competitions, the Turkish Airlines EuroLeague and the 7DAYS EuroCup, as well as the sport‚Äôs premier under-18 showcase, the EB Adidas Next Generation Tournament. 
The EB competitions bring the elite of European basketball to all five continents and to the entire sports community through the OTT platform EuroLeague TV. EB also organizes a series of community and educational programs. Its ground-breaking corporate social responsibility program One Team features all EB clubs that have already made a difference in the lives of over 22,000 participants. Its Sports Business MBA trains future professionals in sports management. 
About One Team 
One Team, Euroleague Basketball's corporate social responsibility (CSR) program, supported by Turkish Airlines as the One Team Founding Patron and with the collaboration of Special Olympics as Proud Partner, uses basketball to achieve real social impact in our communities. With an innovative model of interconnectedness across an entire continent, Euroleague Basketball and its clubs have developed a complete CSR program that brings together activities from each team in an integrated, impactful way, working under the theme of "community integration". Each participating club develops a specific One Team project tailored to its own community needs to benefit groups in danger of exclusion due to problems such as substance abuse and gender, physical or intellectual disability. Since its founding in 2012, the One Team program has reached already directly and indirectly more than 22,000 participants through its various team projects.

Since its founding in 2012, the One Team program has reached already directly and indirectly more than 22,000 participants through its various team projects.

snippet.title: Crew-2 Mission | Coast
snippet.description:
On Friday, April 23 at 5:49 a.m. EDT, 9:49 UTC, SpaceX and NASA launched Dragon‚Äôs second six-month operational crew mission (Crew-2) to the International Space Station (ISS) from historic Launch Complex 39A (LC-39A) at NASA‚Äôs Kennedy Space Center in Florida. Following stage separation, Falcon 9‚Äôs first stage landed on the ‚ÄúOf Course I Still Love You‚Äù droneship, stationed in the Atlantic Ocean. 

Crew-2 is currently in orbit and is expected to autonomously dock with the International Space Station on Saturday, April 24, at approximately 5:10 a.m. EDT, 9:10 UTC.

snippet.title: Sea Trials concluse. La portaerei Cavour della Marina Militare certificata per l'impiego degli F-35B
snippet.description:
La portaerei Cavour ha completato le "prove in mare" (sea trials) per l'impiego operativo dell'F-35B, il velivolo da combattimento di quinta generazione del programma Joint Strike Fighter con capacit√Ý di decollo corto e atterraggio verticale di prossima dotazione alla Marina Militare in sostituzione degli AV8B-plus.
Una sfida resa ancor pi√π impegnativa dalla situazione legata alla pandemia che ha imposto rigidi protocolli sanitari. I test di compatibilit√Ý sono durati quattro settimane, iniziati con la partenza da Norfolk il 28 febbraio scorso e con il primo appontaggio dell'F-35B avvenuto il 1 marzo.

snippet.title: Grillo e la difesa del figlio, Boschi: "Video scandaloso, √® una vergogna"
snippet.description:
"Il video di Beppe Grillo √® scandaloso. Non sta a me dire chi ha torto e chi ha ragione, per quello ci sono i magistrati. Ma che Beppe Grillo usi il suo potere mediatico e politico per assolvere il figlio √® vergognoso". Lo dice Maria Elena Boschi di Iv, in un video sui social, parlando del filmato in cui il garante M5S prende le difese del figlio Ciro, accusato di stupro insieme ad altri suoi tre amici.

Le parole di Beppe Grillo "sono piene di maschilismo. Quando dice che la ragazza che ha denunciato il figlio per stupro √® sostanzialmente una bugiarda perch√© ha impiegato otto giorni a denunciare, fa un torto a tutte le donne vittime di violenza" afferma Maria Elena Boschi. "Perch√© - aggiunge - forse Beppe Grillo non sa il dolore che passa attraverso quelle donne che spesso non impiegano giorni ma settimane per trovare il coraggio di denunciare e superare anche magari la vergogna e l'angoscia".

"Quando Beppe Grillo dice che suo figlio √® chiaramente innocente perch√© non √® n√© in carcere n√© agli arresti domiciliari, dice una falsit√Ý da un punto di vista giuridico che non sta n√© in cielo n√© in terra" scandisce ancora. "Anche quando ci spiega che sono solo dei 'coglioni', cito Grillo, quattro ragazzi che stanno scherzando, deresponsabilizza degli adulti maggiorenni - sottolinea - e lo fa semplicemente perch√© lui √® famoso e pu√≤ fare l'avvocato del proprio figlio".

"A me piacerebbe che dentro il Movimento 5 Stelle qualcuno, magari qualche donna, prendesse le distanze da Beppe Grillo - dice Maria Elena Boschi - E non perch√© io debba condannare il figlio di Beppe Grillo, non sta a me farlo, io sono garantista con tutti anche verso di lui, per me vale la presunzione di innocenza anche per il figlio di Beppe Grillo".

G√ºlseren Budayƒ±cƒ±oƒülu‚Äônun aynƒ± isimli romanƒ±ndan uyarlanan, ger√ßek bir a≈ük hikayesinin konu alƒ±ndƒ±ƒüƒ± Camdaki Kƒ±z, ba≈üarƒ±lƒ± oyuncu kadrosuyla da g√∂z dolduruyor. Nalan karakterini Burcu Biricik‚Äôin canlandƒ±rdƒ±ƒüƒ± Camdaki Kƒ±z‚Äôda; Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu G√ºler, Feyyaz ≈ûerifoƒülu, Hamza Yazƒ±cƒ±, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur S√ºrer, Selma Erge√ß,  ≈ûerif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tuƒürul T√ºlek yer alƒ±yor. Senaryosunu Seda Altaylƒ± Turgutlu‚Äônun kaleme aldƒ±ƒüƒ±, y√∂netmenliƒüini ise Nadim G√º√ß'√ºn √ºstlendiƒüi Camdaki Kƒ±z Per≈üembe 20.00'de Kanal D'de!

------------------

Camdaki Kƒ±z Trailer is streaming! Adapted from Gulseren Budayicioglu‚Äôs novel of the same name, Camdaki Kƒ±z is based on a true love story. Kanal D‚Äôs new drama has a phenomenal cast. Burcu Biricik is going to portray the character Nalan, and the other successful actors and actresses of the series are Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu Guler, Feyyaz Serifoglu, Hamza Yazici, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur Surer, Selma Ergec, Serif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tugrul Tulek. snippet.title: A Scuola Mi Prendevano in Giro, Ma Ora Tutti Vogliono Essere Miei Amici
snippet.description:
ISCRIVITI https://bit-ly.ru/c6RD4
#diariosegreto #storiaanimata #storiavera #storiadianimazione #storiadivita


Mi chiamo Sarah e fino all‚Äôet√Ý di 15 anni... non sono mai andata a scuola. √à difficile da credere, lo so, ma la mia famiglia √® abbastanza singolare. I miei genitori sono zoologi e abbiamo vissuto in Antartide perch√© volevano studiare gli animali selvaggi. Quindi, da che ho memoria, sono sempre stata circondata da distese innevate. I lemming e le foche erano i miei amici e i miei genitori erano i miei insegnanti e, nel tempo libero, mi facevano lezione.

snippet.title: CAPAREZZA - LA SCELTA
snippet.description:
Ascolta ora La Scelta http://pld.lnk.to/lascelta
Preordina il nuovo album in uscita il 7 Maggio qui https://pld.lnk.to/ExuviaID

Una produzione Borotalco.tv 
Scritto da Michele Salvemini e Fabrizio Conte
Regia di Fabrizio Conte
Executive Producer: Matteo Stefani
Dop: Stefano Bella
Line Producer: Tommaso Spagnoli 
Direttore di produzione/Casting Director: Monica Conte
Ass. Producer: Maria Onano
Colorist: Claudio Beltrami 
Operatore ronin: Loris Galetta
16 mm Shooter: Marco Proserpio
Gaffer: Alessandro Bella
Second: Filippo Testa
Focus puller: Juan Sebastian Florez 
Aiuto mdp: Desiree Braida 
2AC: Sar√Ý Di Natale 
Macchinista: Gabriel Reyes 
Second: David Alvarez
Aiuto macchinista: Davide Orlando
Scenografia: Romeo Steiner e Weronica Wolinska
Ass. Scenografia: Martino Pastori , Sofia matarazzo di licosa, Jacopo Boscaini, Federica castelli
Makeup: Mary Parpinel
Video backstage: Mattia Ferrero
Fotografo backstage: Morena Brambilla
Amministrazione: Agnese Incurvati, Annamaria Modica 
A&R: Fausto Donato 
Product Manager: Emanuela Redaelli

Si ringrazia Graziano Ostuni di Universal e il Live Music Club Trezzo sull'adda (Mi)

TESTO
Da grande suoner√≤ la ‚ÄúPastorale‚Äù, ora sul piano resto curvo come un pastorale.
Mio padre √® d‚Äôumore un po‚Äô grigio, mi vuole prodigio 
ma sono solo un bambino e c‚Äô√® rimasto male.
Padre lascia stare l‚Äôalcool, ti rovini, sei severo quando faccio tirocini. 
Io sono romantico ma pure tu. Mi vedi solo come un mazzo di fiorini!
Sono Ludovico, culto, mito, donne mi scansano come avessi avuto il tifo.
Troppi affanni, a 30 anni ho perduto udito, tu mi parli e mi pari un fottuto mimo.
Se la mettiamo su questo piano la mia vita ha senso se la mettiamo su questo piano,
quindi prendo lo sgabellino e lascio la corda, canto l‚Äô‚ÄúInno alla gioia‚Äù
perch√© vedo l‚Äôabisso ma su questo, plano.
Scrivo mille lettere, faccio rumore, lotto col silenzio ma ce la far√≤.
Tengo la mia musica, lascio l‚Äôamore, io sar√≤ immortale, la mia amata no. 

E sono contento della scelta che ho fatto. Nemmeno un rimorso nemmeno un rimpianto.
Si, sono contento, che bella scoperta. Non serve nient‚Äôaltro che fare una scelta.
Patetica, eroica, patetica, eroica, patetica, eroica, questa √® la mia vita non dimenticarlo.

Mi chiamo Marco.
Sento il gelo dei riflettori, vorrei rimanerne fuori ma il mondo vuole che vada in tour.
Entro in classifica perch√© la fama √® cieca, cos√¨ cieca che in fondo non mi riguarda pi√π.
E‚Äô un buon lavoro, incasso da molto, vale come un disco d‚Äôoro in cassa da morto, 
voglio fissare mio figlio, il tempo passa e m‚Äôaccorgo 
che sto fissando un foglio tipo carta da forno. 
Hey, sono Marco, new romantico, sotto palco scompaio, ‚Äúpuff‚Äù come borotalco.
Che guaio, bruciano il mio contratto ch√© il sound √® cupo, rarefatto.
Ho preparato un ritiro veloce, la mia famiglia √® pi√π importante di un giro di note 
e questi parlano, parlano mentre io sto ricucendo la vita con un filo di voce.
E non lascio lettere, niente rumore, amo il mio silenzio e non comprendi quanto.
Grazie per gli applausi ma ho scelto l‚Äôamore, questa √® la mia vita non dimenticarlo.

E sono contento della scelta che ho fatto. Nemmeno un rimorso nemmeno un rimpianto.
Si, sono contento, che bella scoperta. Non serve nient‚Äôaltro che fare una scelta.
Patetica, eroica, patetica, eroica, patetica, eroica, questa √® la mia vita non dimenticarlo.

O continuare gli accordi o game over, Guardare il mondo da sobri o in hangover
Mi dico giocati il jolly, per dove? O Mark o Bee
Casa e famiglia o canzoni e le prove, O con i figli o tra i corni e le viole
Mi dico giocati il jolly, per dove? O Mark o Bee

(Ed. Sunny Cola Srl)

TESTO
Da grande suoner√≤ la ‚ÄúPastorale‚Äù, ora sul piano resto curvo come un pastorale.
Mio padre √® d‚Äôumore un po‚Äô grigio, mi vuole prodigio 
ma sono solo un bambino e c‚Äô√® rimasto male.
Padre lascia stare l‚Äôalcool, ti rovini, sei severo quando faccio tirocini. 
Io sono romantico ma pure tu. Mi vedi solo come un mazzo di fiorini!
Sono Ludovico, culto, mito, donne mi scansano come avessi avuto il tifo.
Troppi affanni, a 30 anni ho perduto udito, tu mi parli e mi pari un fottuto mimo.
Se la mettiamo su questo piano la mia vita ha senso se la mettiamo su questo piano,
quindi prendo lo sgabellino e lascio la corda, canto l‚Äô‚ÄúInno alla gioia‚Äù
perch√© vedo l‚Äôabisso ma su questo, plano.
Scrivo mille lettere, faccio rumore, lotto col silenzio ma ce la far√≤.
Tengo la mia musica, lascio l‚Äôamore, io sar√≤ immortale, la mia amata no. 

E sono contento della scelta che ho fatto. Nemmeno un rimorso nemmeno un rimpianto.
Si, sono contento, che bella scoperta. Non serve nient‚Äôaltro che fare una scelta.
Patetica, eroica, patetica, eroica, patetica, eroica, questa √® la mia vita non dimenticarlo.

Mi chiamo Marco.
Sento il gelo dei riflettori, vorrei rimanerne fuori ma il mondo vuole che vada in tour.
Entro in classifica perch√© la fama √® cieca, cos√¨ cieca che in fondo non mi riguarda pi√π.
E‚Äô un buon lavoro, incasso da molto, vale come un disco d‚Äôoro in cassa da morto, 
voglio fissare mio figlio, il tempo passa e m‚Äôaccorgo 
che sto fissando un foglio tipo carta da forno. 
Hey, sono Marco, new romantico, sotto palco scompaio, ‚Äúpuff‚Äù come borotalco.
Che guaio, bruciano il mio contratto ch√© il sound √® cupo, rarefatto.
Ho preparato un ritiro veloce, la mia famiglia √® pi√π importante di un giro di note 
e questi parlano, parlano mentre io sto ricucendo la vita con un filo di voce.
E non lascio lettere, niente rumore, amo il mio silenzio e non comprendi quanto.
Grazie per gli applausi ma ho scelto l‚Äôamore, questa √® la mia vita non dimenticarlo.

snippet.title: Radhe | Trailer | Salman Khan | Disha Patani | Randeep Hooda | Jackie Shroff | Prabhudeva | 13 May
snippet.description:
Yeh Eid, #Radhe Ke Saath
Countdown starts now!

#RadheTrailerOutNow

#SalmanKhan #JackieShroff #DishaPatani #RadeepHooda #PrabhuDeva #SKFFilms #ZeeStudios #SohailKhan #Atul #ReelLifeProduction #ZeeMusicCompany #ZeePlexOfficial #ZEE5 
 
The film will have a  multi-format release & a wide theatrical release internationally on 13th May 2021. It will release in over 40 countries including Middle East, USA, Australia, New Zealand, Singapore, UK, Europe among others.

Directed by Prabhudeva 
Produced by Salma Khan, Sohail Khan, Reel Life Pvt.Ltd
Director of photography: Avananka Bose 
Screenplay: A.C Mugil & Vijay Maurya 
Dialogues: Vijay Maurya 
Music: Sajid Wajid, Devi Sri Prasad, Himesh Reshammiya
Editor: Ritesh Soni 
Action director: Myeonghaeng hod & Anbariv 
Production design: Durga Prasad Mahapatra 
Costume design: Ashley Rebello & Alvira Khan Agnihotri  
Sound designer: Parikshit Lalwani & Kunal Mehta 
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose, CAS
Background Score: Sanchit Balhara & Ankit Balhara

pasta for lasagna

at least 5 layers.

id.description:
Hal-Hal yang Saya Gunakan ...
https://rapanelloelasuacucina.blogspot.com/2020/08/il-negozio-di-rapanello.html
__________________________________________________
Lasagna Krim dengan sayuran Lasagna sayuran Lasagna vegetarian

Bahan untuk lasagna sayuran
sayuran yang Anda sukai 600 gram
pasta untuk lasagna
1 liter bechamel

Potong semua sayuran menjadi kubus.
masukkan ke dalam wajan, bawang putih, minyak zaitun dan sayuran.
Masak dengan penutup selama 10 menit.
Buat b√©chamel
Satu liter susu
70 gram tepung jagung
sedikit garam
Campur 70 gram tepung maizena dengan setengah gelas air dingin.
Rebus susu.
Saat susu sudah panas, tambahkan kanji.
Campur 30 detik dan b√©chamel siap.

Campur sayuran yang sudah dimasak dengan bechamel.
Parut 150 gram keju
Buat lapisan lasagna dengan sayuran dan keju.
setidaknya 5 lapisan.
panggang dalam oven yang sudah dipanaskan pada suhu 170 derajat selama 30 menit.

en-IN.title: Lasagna Creamy with vegetables Vegetable lasagna Vegetarian lasagna
en-IN.description:
The Things I Use ...
https://rapanelloelasuacucina.blogspot.com/2020/08/il-negozio-di-rapanello.html
__________________________________________________
Lasagna Creamy with vegetables Vegetable lasagna Vegetarian lasagna

Ingredients for the vegetable lasagna
the vegetables you prefer 600 grams
pasta for lasagna
1 liter of bechamel

Cut all the vegetables into cubes.
put them in a pan, garlic, olive oil and vegetables.
Cook with lid for 10 minutes.
Make the b√©chamel
A liter of milk
70 grams of corn starch
little salt
Mix 70 grams of cornstarch with half a glass of cold water.
Boil the milk.
When the milk is hot, add the starch.
Mix 30 seconds and the b√©chamel is ready.

Mix the cooked vegetables with the bechamel.
Grater 150 grams of cheese
Make the lasagna layers with the vegetables and cheese.
at least 5 layers.
bake in a preheated oven at 170 degrees for 30 minutes.

Make the b√©chamel

little salt

snippet.title: First Video of NASA‚Äôs Ingenuity Mars Helicopter in Flight, Includes Takeoff and Landing (High-Res)
snippet.description:
In this video captured by NASA‚Äôs Perseverance rover, the agency's Ingenuity Mars Helicopter took the first powered, controlled flight on another planet on April 19, 2021. 

The rover was parked at ‚ÄúVan Zyl Overlook,‚Äù about 211 feet (64.3 meters) away in Mars' Jezero Crater and chronicled the flight operations with its cameras.

These images from the rover‚Äôs Mastcam-Z cameras show the helicopter hovering above the Red Planet's surface. During this first flight, the helicopter climbed to an altitude of 10 feet (3 meters), hovered, and then touched back down on the surface of Mars.
 
Ingenuity is a technology demonstration. The 4-pound (1.8-kilogram) rotorcraft will help determine whether future explorations on Mars could include an aerial perspective.

Perseverance touched down at "Octavia E. Butler Landing" with Ingenuity attached to its belly on Feb. 18, 2021. The helicopter was deployed to the surface on April 3.

For more information on Ingenuity, visit : https://mars.nasa.gov/technology/helicopter/.

For more information on Perseverance, visit: https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance.

Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech/ASU/MSSS

snippet.title: PATATE bruciate dal freddo, come ci dobbiamo comportare, cosa possiamo fare
snippet.description:
Spesso l'arrivo delle gelate primaverili causano danni ingenti all'agricoltura, sopratutto a colture che vegetano presto come le patate. Se subiamo questi danni dal freddo e dalle brinate cosa possiamo fare e cosa ci aspettiamo come raccolto?

snippet.title: Shakedown LIVE - WRC Croatia Rally 2021
snippet.description:
Don¬¥t miss WRC round 3 LIVE on wrcplus.com 22 - 25 April üá≠üá∑ 

More FREE videos, news and results at https://www.wrc.com

Watch LIVE rally! All stages of every rally live or on demand with live cameras on stage, onboard and in the air, including expert analysis, behind the scenes stories, split times and real time GPS tracking. Thousands of onboard videos with moving maps, speed, gear, pedal and steering data, rally highlights, and exclusive videos all available on demand anytime, on any device with your subscription to WRC+ All Live.
http://www.wrcplus.com/

Find out about the official WRC video game on PC, XBox, Playstation and Nintendo Consoles here.
https://www.wrcthegame.com

eSports WRC Championship, is open to anyone, driving on the same roads and stages as the real-life WRC.
https://www.wrc.com/en/more/gaming/esports-wrc/

Rally Fan? Merch, clothing and more at the official shop of the FIA World Rally Championship.
https://shop.wrc.com/

Subscribe to this YouTube Channel for exclusive, frequent new rally videos.
https://www.youtube.com/user/wrc?sub_confirmation=1

Behind the scenes and more on Facebook.
https://www.facebook.com/WorldRally

Videos, photos, stories and competitions to win on Instagram.
https://www.instagram.com/officialwrc/

News, results, photos, videos on Twitter.
https://twitter.com/OfficialWRC

The WRC is the FIA World Rally Championship, a tough motorsport using rally cars on real roads around the world. Watch the best rally drivers battle on gravel and asphalt roads with mud, rain, dust, ice and heat! Watch high speed action as the rally drivers power slide and drift round narrow corners, go flat out over a big jump or through a watersplash, handbrake turn round a hairpin, survive a big moment, or have a massive crash! Rally requires maximum attack and careful tactics to become world rally champion.

Each rally has timed sections called special stages, on closed roads. Drivers complete these stages as quickly as possible. A co-driver reads pace notes that explain the hazards ahead. Rally drivers use the same rally car to travel to each stage on public roads, following normal traffic regulations. The crew which completes all the stages in the shortest time is the rally winner. Championship points are won using the same scoring system as Formula 1. The championship is administered by F√©d√©ration Internationale de l'Automobile (FIA), motorsport's world governing body.

Over 30 countries have hosted WRC rallies. Rally Monte Carlo, Rally Argentina, Rally Finland, Rally Portugal, Tour de Corse on Corsica, France, Rally Sardegna on Sardinia, Italy, Safari Rally in Kenya, Acropolis Rally in Greece, Rally New Zealand, Rally Australia, Rally Japan, Rally GB, Rally Catalunya, Rallye Deutschland, Rally Mexico and many more.

Some of the world's greatest drivers have won the FIA World Rally Championship for Drivers, like Colin McRae, Carlos Sainz, Walter R√∂hrl, Stig Blomqvist, Petter Solberg, Ott T√§nak. The list of world rally champions includes many Finnish rally drivers like Juha Kankkunen, Tommi M√§kinen, Ari Vatanen, Marcus Gr√∂nholm, Hannu Mikkola. French drivers have had success with S√©bastien Ogier, and 9 times world champion S√©bastien Loeb. Famous drivers from other motorsports have come to try rally driving like Ken Block from Rallycross, and Robert Kubica and Kimi R√§ikk√∂nen from F1.

Car companies compete for the prestigious FIA World Rally Championship for Manufacturers awarded to the most successful WRC constructor. Winners include Citroen, Hyundai, Volkswagen and Peugeot. Ford have had success with the Ford Escort, Ford Focus and Ford Fiesta when the M-Sport team won in 2017.
The 1980's featured the iconic Group B rally cars like the Lancia 037 and Delta S4, Peugeot 205 T16, MG Metro 6R4, Ford RS200 and Audi Quattro.
Japan dominated the 1990s with the Mitsubishi Lancer, Subaru Impreza, and Toyota Celica and Toyota Corolla. Toyota returned to the WRC in 2017 with the Toyota Yaris WRC, winning in 2018. The 2019 championship was won by Hyundai with the Hyundai i20 Coupe WRC. Find out about the latest winners and champions at https://www.wrc.com

In conformit√Ý con la Costituzione, il Presidente della Russia rivolge ogni anno all'Assemblea federale un messaggio sulla situazione nel Paese e sulle principali direzioni della politica interna ed estera. Se altri Paesi non vogliono avere un dialogo e scelgono invece un tono arrogante, allora la Russia trover√Ý il modo di proteggere i propri interessi, dice Putin: "La Russia non vuole bruciare i ponti delle relazioni nemmeno con gli avversari, ma se sono loro stessi a volerlo, allora devono prepararsi a una dura risposta". 
Cos'altro ha detto Putin durante l'Assemblea?: https://sptnkne.ws/FZVS

snippet.title: A cena da PEPE IN GRANI, la migliore pizzeria d'Italia - Ep. 21
snippet.description:
23.08.2020
Siamo super gasati nell'andare a provare quella che √® stata definita la migliore pizzeria d'Italia (e del mondo): andiamo da Pepe in grani, pizzeria di Franco Pepe, a Caiazzo (Caserta).
Le parole non possono rendere giustizia alla complessit√Ý di sapori e alla meraviglia dell'impasto, proposto sia con condimenti salati che dolci, ogni volta originali e insieme semplici e rispettosi della tradizione gastronomica locale.

snippet.title: Friday Night Funkin' - Sky VS Tankman (Duet Ugh Song) [FNF Week 7]
snippet.description:
Friday Night Funkin' side by side comparison of official Week 7 Tankman Ugh vs Sky Ugh Mod for the PC in 1080p Ultra HD. The beginning of the video has both of them sing at the same time and eventually they'll take turns singing the ugh song on their own.

Out of these 2 characters, which one do you think sings the ugh song the best?

Sky Mod: https://gamebanana.com/gamefiles/19972
Sky sings Ugh: https://gamebanana.com/gamefiles/20914
Playable Tankmen: https://gamebanana.com/skins/185177
Get the game and support the creators of the game:
https://ninja-muffin24.itch.io/funkin
https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/770371
High Effort Ugh 2.0 Mod: https://gamebanana.com/gamefiles/17077

Disclaimer: I edited the dialogue text in as a joke so it's not official.
---------------------------------
Friday Night Funkin' Week 7 is the newest update featuring Tankman, the Newgrounds mascot and Pico. A Newgrounds timed exclusive, also has a couple of his friends holding Girlfriend as a hostage. It's up to Boyfriend to save her the only way he can: the power of music!

en.title: Friday Night Funkin' - Sky VS Tankman (Duet Ugh Song) [FNF Week 7]
en.description:
Friday Night Funkin' side by side comparison of official Week 7 Tankman Ugh vs Sky Ugh Mod for the PC in 1080p Ultra HD. The beginning of the video has both of them sing at the same time and eventually they'll take turns singing the ugh song on their own.

Out of these 2 characters, which one do you think sings the ugh song the best?

Sky Mod: https://gamebanana.com/gamefiles/19972
Sky sings Ugh: https://gamebanana.com/gamefiles/20914
Playable Tankmen: https://gamebanana.com/skins/185177
Get the game and support the creators of the game:
https://ninja-muffin24.itch.io/funkin
https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/770371
High Effort Ugh 2.0 Mod: https://gamebanana.com/gamefiles/17077

Disclaimer: I edited the dialogue text in as a joke so it's not official.
---------------------------------
Friday Night Funkin' Week 7 is the newest update featuring Tankman, the Newgrounds mascot and Pico. A Newgrounds timed exclusive, also has a couple of his friends holding Girlfriend as a hostage. It's up to Boyfriend to save her the only way he can: the power of music!

1080p 60fps Friday Night Funkin' gameplay by CommunityGame (2021)

Friday Night Funkin' - WEEK 7 All Tankman Death Quotes & Game Over Screens:
https://youtu.be/n8ROKNI2M8c

Friday Night Funkin' - Week 7: Hard Difficulty Gameplay & Cutscenes:

snippet.title: Queen Arrives at Windsor Castle and Funeral Procession Begins
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth II and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Charles, Prince Edward, Prince Andrew and Princess Anne, joined a procession on Saturday at Windsor Castle ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

The service will salute both his service in the Royal Navy and his support for Britain's monarch over three quarters of a century.

#Queen #PrincePhilip #Funeral
